allow: Bash(find C:worksentiment-analyzer -type f \\\(-name TODO* -o -name ROADMAP* -o -name PHASES* -o -name PLAN* \\\))

Bash(powershell -NonInteractive -Command "
\\$err = \\$null
\\$null = [System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\(
    'D:\\\\work\\\\sentiment-analyzer\\\\start.ps1',
    [ref]\\$null,
    [ref]\\$err
\)
if \(\\$err.Count -eq 0\) { Write-Host 'Parse OK - no syntax errors' }
else { \\$err | ForEach-Object { Write-Host \\$_.Message } }
" 2>&1)
